summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 白宮與立法者傳出達成CLARITY法案的交易，推動加密市場法規的進一步落實。
2. 比特幣價格目標保持在7萬美元，因通脹擔憂持續影響市場情緒。
3. Grayscale申請HYPE ETF，將追蹤最大鏈上衍生品DEX Hyperliquid，顯示機構對加密市場的持續興趣。
4. 內華達州成為首個禁止預測市場Kalshi的州，顯示地方政府對加密相關業務的監管趨勢。
5. 以太坊交易量達三年高點，市場對其未來表現充滿期待。

## 📊 市場概況
當前整體市場氛圍偏向於穩定，但仍然受到通脹影響。主流加密貨幣如比特幣（BTC）和以太坊（ETH）在小幅波動中保持上漲趨勢。比特幣目前價格為$70,814，維持在多頭區間；以太坊則報價$2,161.71，亦呈現穩健增長。其他幣種如Solana和BNB同樣顯示出良好表現，顯示出市場對主流幣的認可度。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據技術指標，比特幣的相對強弱指數（RSI）為53.23，表明其仍有上升空間，且均線顯示出多頭訊號。以太坊的RSI為55.46，顯示出強勁的買盤支持，預示著後市可能持續上漲。Solana的RSI為55.23，維持在多頭區間，顯示出市場對其的信心。整體來看，主流幣的技術指標均顯示出良好的上漲動能。

## 😱 市場情緒
當前恐懼貪婪指數為11，顯示出「極度恐懼」，這反映出市場參與者對潛在風險的高度警覺。儘管價格表現穩定，但市場的恐懼情緒可能影響短期內投資者的信心。社群情緒普遍謹慎，投資者對未來市場走勢的觀望態度明顯，建議投資者在操作時保持謹慎。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
隨著市場情緒的波動，投資者需警惕潛在的市場回調風險。特別是面對通脹擔憂及立法環境的不確定性，可能導致價格劇烈波動。此外，對於新興的加密產品如Grayscale的HYPE ETF，投資者應仔細評估其風險與潛在收益，避免盲目跟風。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
今日需持續關注白宮與立法者在CLARITY法案上的進展，以及市場對該法案的反應。此外，投資者應留意比特幣及以太坊的價格走勢，特別是在重要技術指標的變化。最後，密切關注內華達州對Kalshi的最新法律動態，這可能影響加密市場的整體走向。

news.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds as Oil Falls
news.summary: Crypto bounced as traders bet the Iran war may end sooner than feared, while prediction markets just had a blockbuster day.
news.title_zh: 晨間快訊：比特幣反彈，油價下跌
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格回升，與油價下跌形成鮮明對比，顯示市場動態變化。

news.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF
news.summary: The proposed spot Bitcoin ETF outlines seed capital, listing plans and trading partners in its latest filing as it moves closer to a potential market debut.
news.title_zh: 摩根士丹利提交MSBT比特幣ETF的修訂S-1文件
news.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利進一步推進其比特幣ETF計劃，提交了修訂的S-1文件以獲取監管批准。

news.title: Kalshi raises over $1 billion at $22 billion valuation in ongoing Coatue-led round: reports
news.summary: The funding highlights continued investor demand for prediction markets despite rising legal challenges and regulatory scrutiny.
news.title_zh: Kalshi在持續的Coatue主導回合中籌集超過10億美元，估值220億美元：報導
news.summary_zh: Kalshi成功籌集資金，估值達到220億美元，顯示市場對其業務模式的信心。

news.title: Coinbase launches 24/7 stock perps for non-US traders
news.summary: Coinbase has launched stock perpetual futures for non-US traders, expanding its push to offer round-the-clock access to multiple asset classes.
news.title_zh: Coinbase為非美國交易者推出24/7股票永久合約
news.summary_zh: Coinbase新推出的24/7股票永久合約服務，旨在滿足全球交易者的需求。

news.title: From $13,700 to $148 million: Bitcoin whale moves 2,100 BTC untouched for over 13 years
news.summary: The bitcoin address initially received the 2,100 BTC on July 4, 2012, when that amount was worth just $13,685.
news.title_zh: 從13700美元到1.48億美元：比特幣鯨魚移動2100 BTC，未動用超過13年
news.summary_zh: 一位比特幣鯨魚在13年後移動2100 BTC，顯示出市場的潛在變化。

news.title: Bitcoin holds steady, with one analyst seeing the upside emerging
news.title_zh: 比特幣穩定，分析師看到上漲潛力
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格保持穩定，一位分析師預測未來將出現上漲趨勢。

news.title: Apple iOS Malware Targets Crypto Apps on Unpatched iPhones: Google
news.summary: The DarkSword exploit chain affects older versions of iOS 18, delivering malware that specifically hunts for exchange and wallet apps.
news.title_zh: 蘋果iOS惡意軟體針對未修補iPhone上的加密應用：谷歌
news.summary_zh: 谷歌警告稱，未修補的iPhone上存在針對加密應用的惡意軟體。

news.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
news.summary: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.
news.title_zh: Ripple調查發現72%的金融領導者認為數位資產至關重要
news.summary_zh: 一項調查顯示，金融界對數位資產的重視程度持續上升。

news.title: Crypto market steadies as derivatives signal caution, macro pressure builds
news.title_zh: 加密市場穩定，衍生品顯示謹慎，宏觀壓力增加
news.summary_zh: 加密市場面臨宏觀經濟壓力，衍生品市場顯示出謹慎的態度。

news.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
news.summary: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.
news.title_zh: 韓國稅務機關尋求私人加密保管機構以應對安全漏洞
news.summary_zh: 韓國稅務機關因安全問題尋求私人加密資產保管解決方案。

news.title: Bitcoin vs gold shows potential bottom signals as BTC bulls defend $70K
news.summary: Technical indicators hint at a possible reversal in BTC’s relative performance, as traders watch whether key support levels can hold.
news.title_zh: 比特幣與黃金顯示潛在底部信號，BTC多頭捍衛7萬美元
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格穩定，多頭努力捍衛70,000美元的支撐位。

news.title: Coinbase launches stock perpetual futures for ‘Magnificent 7’ names, including Apple, Tesla and Nvidia, expanding ‘everything exchange’ push
news.summary: Coinbase has introduced stock perpetual futures for eligible non-U.S. users, with selected ETF products also available.
news.title_zh: Coinbase推出包括蘋果、特斯拉和Nvidia在內的‘壯麗7’股票永久期貨，擴大‘萬能交易所’推進
news.summary_zh: Coinbase擴展其交易平台，推出多家知名公司的股票期貨。

news.title: Bitcoin Rallies to $71K as Bessent Mulls Lifting Some Iran Oil Sanctions
news.summary: Bitcoin bounced Friday as U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent outlined possible responses to soaring oil prices.
news.title_zh: 比特幣漲至71,000美元，Bessent考慮解除部分伊朗石油制裁
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格上漲至71,000美元，市場對伊朗制裁的變化表示關注。

news.title: Gemini hit with investor lawsuit over strategy shift, stock slump as losses widen and layoffs mount
news.summary: Gemini is facing a class-action lawsuit in New York accusing it of misleading investors about its strategy before and after its 2025 IPO.
news.title_zh: Gemini因策略轉變、股價下跌而遭投資者訴訟，損失擴大和裁員增加
news.summary_zh: Gemini面臨投資者訴訟，因策略調整導致股價下跌和裁員。

news.title: Ripple data reveals stablecoins are becoming the go-to tool for corporate treasury
news.title_zh: Ripple數據顯示穩定幣正成為企業財務的首選工具
news.summary_zh: Ripple的數據顯示，穩定幣在企業財務管理中越來越受歡迎，成為主要的資金工具。

news.title: Bitcoin long-term holder selling slows, signaling ‘potentially constructive’ trend: VanEck
news.summary: VanEck's latest report noted that the selling pressure among bitcoin miners remained steady despite a decline in profitability.
news.title_zh: 比特幣長期持有者拋售減緩，顯示出「潛在建設性」趨勢：VanEck
news.summary_zh: VanEck指出，比特幣長期持有者的拋售行為減少，可能預示著市場的正面趨勢。

news.title: Bitcoin’s price action looks dangerously similar to the pattern that sent it crashing to $60,000
news.title_zh: 比特幣價格走勢與曾使其崩跌至6萬美元的模式驚人相似
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的價格走勢顯示出與過去崩跌的模式相似，投資者需謹慎觀察。

news.title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
news.summary: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are re
news.title_zh: 量子風險真實存在，但並非所有加密錢包同樣脆弱：Galaxy
news.summary_zh: Galaxy報告指出，量子風險對加密錢包的影響不一，部分錢包更具防護能力。

news.title: Decentralized social network Bluesky discloses $100 million Series B amid leadership change
news.summary: The company said it is now disclosing the April 2025 funding as it moves into 'a new era of leadership and further growth.'
news.title_zh: 去中心化社交網絡Bluesky在領導層變動中披露1億美元B輪融資
news.summary_zh: Bluesky宣布完成1億美元的B輪融資，正值其領導層發生變動之際。

news.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
news.summary: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI server
news.title_zh: 超微創始人因涉嫌25億美元AI晶片走私計劃被捕
news.summary_zh: 超微的共同創始人因涉嫌參與一項巨額AI晶片走私計劃而被執法機構逮捕。

news.title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
news.summary: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric b
news.title_zh: Gemini因IPO後策略轉變及股價下滑被起訴
news.summary_zh: Gemini面臨法律挑戰，因其IPO後的策略轉變和股價持續下滑而被起訴。

news.title: Bitcoin jumps to $70,800 as oil retreats; ether and XRP lag
news.title_zh: 比特幣價格攀升至70,800美元，油價回落；以太幣和XRP表現落後
news.summary_zh: 隨著油價回落，比特幣價格上漲至70,800美元，而以太幣和XRP則表現不佳。

news.title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
news.summary: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports
news.title_zh: 上訴法院駁回Kalshi要求阻止內華達州執法行動的請求
news.summary_zh: Kalshi的請求被上訴法院駁回，無法阻止內華達州的執法行動。

news.title: Morgan Stanley sets MSBT ticker and $1 million seed capital for bitcoin ETF
news.title_zh: 摩根士丹利為比特幣ETF設立MSBT代碼及100萬美元種子資本
news.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利宣布為其比特幣ETF設立MSBT代碼，並提供100萬美元的種子資本。

news.title: Kentucky Senate Urged to Strip Hardware Wallet Provision From Crypto Bill
news.summary: A crypto kiosk bill in Kentucky includes language that could effectively outlaw self-custody, drawing industry backlash.
news.title_zh: 肯塔基州參議院被敦促從加密貨幣法案中刪除硬體錢包條款
news.summary_zh: 肯塔基州參議院面臨壓力，要求刪除加密貨幣法案中的硬體錢包相關條款，以促進更清晰的監管框架。

news.title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
news.summary: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.
news.title_zh: 主要黃金貿易組織發布代幣化黃金框架
news.summary_zh: 一個重要的黃金貿易組織推出了代幣化黃金的框架，旨在促進黃金市場的數位化和流動性。

news.title: Nvidia Deepens Grip on Cloud AI With Major AWS Chip Deal
news.summary: The deal would help scale capacity as AWS builds its own chips, revealing deeper reliance on Nvidia’s stack as usage keeps growing.
news.title_zh: Nvidia深化對雲端AI的控制，與AWS達成重大晶片交易
news.summary_zh: Nvidia與亞馬遜網路服務簽署了一項重要的晶片交易，進一步鞏固其在雲端AI領域的領導地位。

news.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
news.summary: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.
news.title_zh: Gemini股價在第四季度財報後盤後飆升6%
news.summary_zh: Gemini在公布第四季度財報後，其股價在盤後交易中上漲了6%，顯示出市場的積極反應。

news.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
news.summary: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.
news.title_zh: FBI警告：Tron上的假FBI代幣試圖詐騙用戶
news.summary_zh: FBI發出警告，提醒用戶注意在Tron平台上出現的假FBI代幣，這是一種詐騙行為。

news.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
news.summary: Weakening onchain activity and bearish derivatives data suggest that a SOL price recovery will take longer than most investors anticipate.
news.title_zh: Solana DApps收入降至18個月低點，SOL價格面臨$80重測風險
news.summary_zh: Solana的去中心化應用程序收入降至18個月以來的最低點，SOL價格可能再次測試$80的支撐位。

news.title: Morgan Stanley advances bitcoin ETF application with amended S-1 filing
news.summary: The amendment confirmed that the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust will list on the NYSE Arca under the ticker symbol MSBT.
news.title_zh: 摩根士丹利推進比特幣ETF申請，提交修訂版S-1文件
news.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利已提交修訂版的S-1文件，進一步推進其比特幣ETF的申請進程。

news.title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
news.summary: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.
news.title_zh: Coinbase與Apex Group在Base上代幣化比特幣收益基金
news.summary_zh: Coinbase與Apex Group合作，在Base平台上推出了代幣化的比特幣收益基金，擴大了投資選擇。

news.title: Bitcoin Trails Money Supply Growth as Energy Costs and Rates Bite
news.summary: Higher fuel costs and restrictive financial conditions are absorbing consumer liquidity, helping explain why expanding global money supply has yet to translate into gains for Bitcoin.
news.title_zh: 比特幣增長落後於貨幣供應，能源成本和利率影響
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的增長速度未能跟上貨幣供應的增長，受到能源成本和利率上升的影響。

news.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
news.title_zh: 加密貨幣清晰法案向參議院聽證會邁進，立法者考慮立法交易
news.summary_zh: 加密貨幣清晰法案正逐步接近參議院的聽證會，立法者正在考慮相關的立法交易選項。
